title: The Teaching Grounds Beyond Naming

features.name: schoolyard-that-teaches
features.desc-on-touch: the ground itself has become a lesson; every worn path tells the story of a child who learned something here.

features.name: chalk-line-lesson
features.desc-on-touch: words written on stone that have learned to grow; the teaching has sunk so deep it emerges as grass.

features.name: name-tree-forgetting
features.desc-on-touch: carved initials that have healed over; the tree has learned that names are less important than the teaching they contained.

features.name: road-becoming-riddle
features.desc-on-touch: the path north teaches through every step; you cannot walk it without learning its lesson, though no one will say what it is.

features.name: silence-where-names-were
features.desc-on-touch: a space where identity has been replaced by understanding; who you were no longer matters, only what you have learned.

inscription: the northern road learns to teach itself by remembering every walker who came before you

file.name: SchoolLog_Northern_Teaching_Grounds_1961_1989.txt
file.note: the final entry is blank; the archive assumes the teaching was complete

exits.label: back to the country where teaching was still being learned
where the lesson becomes indistinguishable from landscape
toward the teaching spreading eastward through fields
where the teaching curves back and teaches itself again
